workloads.name: Apple Metal Bun ORT WebGPU provider compare Gemma-3 270M
workloads.description: Repo-only same-stack Bun ORT WebGPU compare for Gemma-3 270M on Apple Metal using the same Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node workload on both sides, with Doe and bun-webgpu as the only varying WebGPU providers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict process-wall provider compare on Apple Metal Bun. Both sides use the same Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node WebGPU stack, the same ONNX model, the same tokenizer-accurate 32-token prompt budget, and the same 1-token decode target on the same Apple Metal host. The only intended execution difference is the WebGPU provider: Doe versus bun-webgpu (Dawn-backed package).
